name: Hephep Fever : Retold
short_description: In this arcade game, remake of the classic Hephep Fever™, eat good stuff, avoid bad stuff, it's simple as that! ... or it is?
detailed_description:
This game is a game about hunger. Follow the story of a hungry sea elephant which was taught only one thing: eat the good stuff, avoid the bad stuff. Learn with them what is good food, what is bad food, and eat enough to fulfill your hunger. If they eat too much garbage, they'll get sick!  Help them find a meaning to life!

In this remake of the famous Hephep Fever™ (you can find it online easily), you will follow along a weird story through multiple environments, trying to eat a maximum of good stuff, trying your best, and maybe leading our protagonist to the peace of mind they deserve? It's up to you. 

Featuring:

  • 4 different environnements to play in

  • An original soundtrack by Detoxoid

  • one-button gameplay! Easy to play!

  • No real facts about sea elephants!

What the game is not:

  • something serious

  • a long game

  • a game about eating disorder, or parental induced mental illness? Those are major topics that should be taken seriously. If you think you suffer one of those, reach for help. I mean it.
